title: solidago virgaurea var. pumila
intro: Solidago virgaurea var. pumila, also known as Dwarf Goldenrod, is a low-growing perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Dwarf Goldenrod include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
